original: a model of your ship painted by Amber
context: <<POS:05955296>> e.description='a model of your ship painted by Amber'

original: Using this item will install the model as a decoration on your ship.
context: <<POS:05955346>> e.tooltip='Using this item will install the model as a decoration on yo'

original: You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...
context: <<POS:05955765>> output("You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...\n")

original: This model has been unlocked for decorating! You may place it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.
translation: 该模型已解锁，可用于装饰！你可以通过飞船特定位置的“装饰”按钮来放置它，例如你的床铺、登船坡道、船员安保控制台或导航终端。
context: <> output("This model has been unlocked for decorating! You may place it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.")

original: A custom-made model of your "+({var1}.is({var0})?"":"old ")+{var2}+", assembled and painted by Amber’s own hands, adorns a shelf. The replica, accurate to the finest detail, is protected by a plastic dome, and just looking at it is enough to bring back some of the good memories you’ve made in your adventures. You’re pretty sure this model will adorn your home or office after you become the de-facto owner of SteeleTech, so that you can gaze at it and reminisce about the good times you’ve had with your "+({var3}?"crew.":"your deer girl.")
context: <<POS:05956468>> <<VARS:var0=flags.AMBER_HOBBY_SHIPMODEL_CLASS,var1=pc_ship,var2=flags.AMBER_HOBBY_SHIPMODEL_NAME,var3=crew(!0)>1>> output("A custom-made model of your "+(pc_ship.is(flags.AMBER_HOBBY_SHIPMODEL_CLASS)?"":"old ")+flags.AMBER_HOBBY_SHIPMODEL_NAME+", assembled and painted by Amber’s own hands, adorns a shelf. The replica, accurate to the finest detail, is protected by a plastic dome, and just looking at it is enough to bring back some of the good memories you’ve made in your adventures. You’re pretty sure this model will adorn your home or office after you become the de-facto owner of SteeleTech, so that you can gaze at it and reminisce about the good times you’ve had with your "+(crew(!0)>1?"crew.":"your deer girl."))
